advice.summary: You completed a 51 km ride with an average heart rate of 131.3 bpm. Ensure to manage your training load to avoid fatigue.
advice.focus: Prioritize recovery and maintain a balanced training load to prevent injury.
advice.nextSession: Plan a light recovery ride or an easy run to keep your legs moving without adding stress.
advice.caution: Watch for signs of fatigue due to recent acute load spikes.
